summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Lee Vaakki Dhaba food ordering system. All backend APIs functional, frontend UI working with minor cart state issue.

integration_issues.issue: Form field timeout during automated testing - may be due to page state or timing

passed_tests: Homepage loads with hero section, categories, bestsellers
Menu page with category filtering and veg-only toggle
Cart page with quantity controls and coupon validation
Checkout page with order type selection and address management
Admin panel access for admin users
